---
title: "George Herbert Thring"
---

## George Herbert Thring

**Dates:** (1859-1941)

### Description

solicitor, Secretary of the Society of Authors, 1891-1906

### Biography

He was the son of Edward Thring, the headmaster of Uppingham whose book on teaching CMY so admired.

### Letters

- [To Christabel Rose Coleridge, Aug 25 [1899]](../letters/3420_To_Christabel_Rose_Coleridge.html)

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
